MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn is present. Represented by Latrice Ransom.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Phelisha Washington is present.
Attorney Marshall Bentley appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of July 03, 2017 is vacated. (501)
